title: Dataset: Episodic and ongoing mechanisms drive plastid-derived nuclear DNA evolution in angiosperms
author: Marczuk-Rojas, Juan Pablo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Genome structural annotation files in gff3 format. The nuclear genomes of 30 flowering/angiosperm plant species were surveyed, for which a unified reannotation of their non-structural gene space (i.e., transposable elements and RNA genes) was obtained.
steps_raw: Genome structural annotation files in gff3 format. The nuclear genomes of 30 flowering/angiosperm plant species were surveyed, for which a unified reannotation of their non-structural gene space (i.e., transposable elements and RNA genes) was obtained.
